case_title: JOHN DAVIS VS. JIMMY WONG ET AL

docket_entries.description: SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF DAVIS, JOHN AS TO DEFENDANT WESCO INSURANCE COMPANY
AMENDED MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,890.00 FILED BY DAVIS, JOHN AS TO DEFENDANT WONG, JIMMY WESCO INSURANCE COMPANY AMERICAN CONTRACTORS INDEMNITY COMPANY
COPYING FEES (10 PAGE) PAID BY PLAINTIFF DAVIS, JOHN
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT WESCO INSURANCE COMPANY

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DAVIS, JOHN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WONG, JIMMY $3,890.00 PRINCIPAL, $125.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,015.00, DEFENDANT WESCO INSURANCE COMPANY SHALL PAY PLAINTIFF $0. PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM AGAINST AMERICAN CONTRACTOR'S INDEMNITY COMPANY IS DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AS UNTIMELY FILED AFTER THE TWO YEAR STATUE OF LIMITATIONS HAS RUN. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED MAR-09-2017, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT WONG, JIMMY
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF DAVIS, JOHN AS TO DEFENDANT WESCO INSURANCE COMPANY

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF APR-24-2017 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF APR-24-2017 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF JOHN DAVIS IS PRESENT. DEFENDANTS ARE PRESENT. DEFENDANT JIMMY WONG IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WESCO INSURANCE COMPANY IS PRESENT. REPRESENTED BY MICHAEL BENTZ, GENERAL ADJUSTER. DEFEDNDANT AMERICAN CONTRACTORS INDEMINITY IS PRESENT. REPRESENTED BY SONYA SABABAC, BOND CLAIM LITIGATION SUPERVISOR. DEFEDNDANT AMERICAN CONTRACTORS INDEMINITY WAIVES SERVICE OF THE CLAIM. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)
